regions.reason: The Claude template includes drawn phone chrome while Flutter captures use the design-phone safe area contract.
Greeting, organizer name, and selected club label are dynamic host fixture data.
Next-up event title, start countdown, counts, and avatars vary by fixture.
The region is declared for state scoping, but Host full-shell references list host_tab_bar in forceCompareMaskIds so this navigation chrome remains part of the comparison.
